commands.repair_reason: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; the branch already contains the narrow fix and proof, with remaining action limited to draft and maintainer review.; Cleared: The diff only changes local SSE parsing logic and tests, with no dependency, workflow, credential, install, or supply-chain surface added. (sha=ffa502faa785b3e5564427935d24699cc090ca84)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the Chrome extension SSE parser to preserve data-field whitespace and adds regression tests for whitespace and colonless data lines.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows `data:` payloads are trimmed on each line and again at dispatch, so a `ReadableStream` containing leading or trailing data whitespace reproduces the loss without needing a broader app setup.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; the branch already contains the narrow fix and proof, with remaining action limited to draft and maintainer review.

target.title: fix: preserve SSE data whitespace in extension parser
target.body:
## Summary

- Parse extension SSE fields by splitting on the first colon so colonless `data` lines are treated as empty data fields.
- Preserve significant leading and trailing whitespace in `data` values while still removing the single optional space after the colon.
- Remove only the parser-appended final newline when dispatching multiline SSE data.

## Why

The Chrome extension SSE parser previously used `trim()`/`trimEnd()` on `data:` payloads. That silently changed valid SSE payload text with meaningful leading or trailing whitespace and skipped the colonless `data` field case defined by SSE parsing rules.

## Behavior proof

Verbose parser regression suite after the fix:

```text
$ pnpm -s vitest run tests/sse-events.test.ts --reporter=verbose
 RUN  v4.1.8 /Users/vincent/Projects/summarize

 ✓ tests/sse-events.test.ts > sse events > encodes and parses known events 2ms
 ✓ tests/sse-events.test.ts > sse events > ignores unknown events 0ms
 ✓ tests/sse-events.test.ts > sse events > flushes a final SSE event at EOF without a blank delimiter 3ms
 ✓ tests/sse-events.test.ts > sse events > flushes a final SSE event at EOF with only a trailing newline 0ms
 ✓ tests/sse-events.test.ts > sse events > preserves significant whitespace in SSE data fields 0ms
 ✓ tests/sse-events.test.ts > sse events > preserves trailing whitespace before joining multi-line SSE data 0ms
 ✓ tests/sse-events.test.ts > sse events > treats colonless SSE data fields as empty values 0ms

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  7 passed (7)
```

Full project gate after the fix:

```text
$ pnpm -s build
# completed successfully

$ pnpm -s check
Checking formatting...
All matched files use the correct format.

 Test Files  525 passed | 29 skipped (554)
      Tests  2785 passed | 43 skipped (2828)

Coverage summary
Statements   : 91.61% (14514/15843)
Branches     : 85.03% (12888/15156)
Functions    : 93.87% (2206/2350)
Lines        : 93.96% (13212/14060)
```

GitHub CI also passed on this PR:

```text
test (24): success
extension-e2e: success
extension-firefox-smoke: success
GitGuardian Security Checks: success
```

## Validation

- `pnpm -s vitest run tests/sse-events.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm -s build`
- `pnpm -s check`
target.author: vincent-peng
